all 'base damage' increase is calculated on the same level (y) so it's additive. a fast translation of the text is 
initial damage (x) - awakener attack  ＊ skill attack
damage increase (y) - strong attack ＊ base damage increases ＊ specific action damage increases (increases strike damage, increases exalt damage, etc.)
final outgoing damage / displayed damage (z) - (x ＊ y + power stacks) ＊ final damage increase (horla anger, wheels that have effects like 'increases awakener's damage by x% of atk stat', etc.) ＊ self weakness status
final incoming damage / actual damage (f) - z ＊ critical damage% ＊ enemy vulnerability status ＊ clementine's unique status
